name: LastPass Business
description: Monitor LastPass Business user access, MFA enrollment, and role-based access controls

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to the LastPass Admin Console at admin.lastpass.com
2. Find your Account Number (CID) at the top of the Dashboard page
3. Go to Advanced > Enterprise API
4. Click 'Create provisioning hash' (or 'Reset your provisioning hash' if one already exists)
5. Copy the CID and Provisioning Hash into the fields below

credentialFields.label: Company ID (CID)
credentialFields.helpText: Found in the LastPass Admin Console Dashboard, labeled 'Account number' at the top of the page

credentialFields.label: Provisioning Hash
credentialFields.helpText: Generate in LastPass Admin Console: Advanced > Enterprise API > Create provisioning hash

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews all LastPass Business users, their login status, and account activity

checks.name: 2FA
checks.description: Verifies that all active LastPass Business users have multi-factor authentication enabled

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Reviews LastPass Business user groups and admin roles to verify role-based access controls are in place
